text: Code refactoring: Split ui.ts mega-store (2547 lines)
description:
ui.ts is too large, split into focused stores:
- navigation.ts: Column/phase selection, keyboard nav
- modals.ts: Modal state management
- graph.ts: Graph view state
- settings.ts: Project settings, preferences

Benefits: Better maintainability, clearer boundaries, easier testing

status.comment: Refactor slice 4 complete: extracted view/graph UI state transitions from `stores/ui.ts` into `stores/ui/view-helpers.ts` (`setViewportSize`, `setView`, graph color/panel/labels persistence, `resetViewState`) with focused tests in `stores/ui/view-helpers.spec.ts`. Combined with prior slices (`navigation-helpers`, `project-helpers`, `modal-helpers`) this modularizes key domains while preserving `useUIStore` API compatibility. Verification: `npm run type-check -w frontend` passed; `npm run test:unit -w frontend` passed (16 files, 63 tests). `stores/ui.ts` reduced from 2747 to 2527 lines; further extraction remains.
